Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
James A. Lico, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Gryphon Partners
Terry P. Anastassiou, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Liberty Surplus Insurance corporation
Court Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina CSR 956

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Gryphon Partners' motion to compel compliance with the prior order and for sanctions is granted in part. The June 20, 2007 order overruled the objections, other than those based on the attorney client or attorney work product privilege, and ordered defendant to produce responsive documents. Defendant failed to comply with the previous order by asserting said objections and stating general objections and conditions in the second supplemental written response. General objections are not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure and are stricken. Within 5 days of notice of this order, defendant is ordered to comply with the prior order by producing any and all responsive documents. If no documents exist for a particular request, that representation shall be verified. The motion for issue and evidentiary sanctions is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted. The Court finds that defendant disobeyed the prior order and made evasive responses. Defendant is ordered to pay monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $3,295 within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
